message:
⚡ Debounce search, EPG refresh cooldown, optimize filter (#80)

- Debounce search input by 300ms to avoid filtering 324K channels on every keystroke
- Add 4-hour cooldown to EPG source refresh (skip re-download if recently refreshed)
- Optimize search filter: single-string haystack instead of per-field lowercase + programme title lookups
- Reduce EPG scope log to only print on initial load

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
